api: SendPulse REST API (https://api.sendpulse.com; official PHP client sendpulse/sendpulse-rest-api-php is the authoritative endpoint reference used for this review)
scope: Pass B full-surface expansion: 5 read streams (addressbooks, campaigns, senders, blacklist, and emails_in_book via an addressbooks-id fan-out) and 10 write actions covering addressbook/email-membership/campaign/sender/blacklist lifecycle mutations. Excluded: the entire SMTP transactional-email surface, the entire bulk-SMS surface (numbers/campaigns/blacklist), the entire web-push surface (websites/tasks/subscriptions), Automation 360 event triggers, and per-email/per-book variable and global-info sub-endpoints -- these are distinct product surfaces (transactional email, SMS, push, event automation) with their own resource models, out of scope for this pass which covers the bulk-email-marketing core (address books, campaigns, senders, blacklist) matching legacy's own 3-stream scope plus its natural nearest neighbors.

excluded.reason: single-addressbook detail; identical record shape to the addressbooks list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
per-book custom-variable-definition sub-resource, not a syncable object list; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
sets custom-field variables on one already-subscribed email; a narrower per-record field update than the top-level add_emails_to_book write this pass models
single-subscriber detail; identical record shape to the emails_in_book stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
campaign-cost estimate for sending to this book, not a syncable object stream
single-campaign detail; identical record shape to the campaigns list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
campaign open/click breakdown by country; analytics sub-resource, Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
campaign click breakdown by referral URL; analytics sub-resource, Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
bulk-SMS sender-name registry, a distinct product surface (SMS) from the bulk-email senders this stream covers; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
requests a resend of the sender email's activation code, not a data read/mutation on a syncable object
activates a sender email using a one-time code; an account-verification action, not ordinary business-data mutation
cross-book global subscriber-status lookup by a single email, not a list-shaped stream; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
bulk cross-book global-status lookup for a caller-supplied email list, not a syncable object stream
removes one email from every address book account-wide; a broader-blast-radius variant of remove_emails_from_book scoped to all books instead of one, out of scope this pass
per-email campaign-send-history breakdown; analytics sub-resource, Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
account balance/currency snapshot, not a syncable object stream
transactional-email send log; distinct product surface (SMTP) from the bulk-email-marketing core this pass covers
sends a single transactional email; distinct product surface (SMTP) from the bulk-email-marketing core this pass covers
